title: Revolve Group Inc (RVLV) Q1 2024 Earnings Summary
text: Revolve Group reported net sales of $270.6 million, down 3% year-over-year and missing analyst expectations. However, the company exceeded earnings expectations with EPS of $0.15 versus the estimated $0.08. Gross margin expanded to 52.3%, up 250 basis points, driven by higher full-price sales. Net income declined 23% to $10.9 million. Free cash flow totaled $36.7 million, down 23% due to less favorable working capital. Active customers grew 5% to 2.55 million. The fashion retailer faced headwinds as total orders placed slightly decreased by 2% while average order value rose modestly at 4%. Both the REVOLVE and FWRD segments experienced sales declines. Management outlined initiatives including product category expansion, international market enhancement, artificial intelligence integration, and digital merchandising improvements. For 2024, the company projects gross margins between 52.5%-53.0%. The results reflect a company managing competitive pressures while attempting to rebuild profitable growth through operational efficiencies and strategic investments.
